name: kafka-consumer-worker
description: Generic Kafka consumer worker — consume จาก topic แล้ว forward ไป downstream URL

scripts.dev: npm run generate && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.workers.yml up --build
scripts.test:send: echo '{"userId":"U001","text":"Hello!"}' | docker exec -i kafka /opt/kafka/bin/kafka-console-producer.sh --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --topic line.messages
scripts.test:stats: echo '--- chat ---' && curl -s http://localhost:5001/stats | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));console.log('messages:',d.totalMessages)" && echo '--- analytics ---' && curl -s http://localhost:5002/stats | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));console.log('messages:',d.totalMessages)" && echo '--- notification ---' && curl -s http://localhost:5003/stats | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));console.log('messages:',d.totalMessages)"
scripts.test:reset: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/reset > /dev/null && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5002/reset > /dev/null && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/reset > /dev/null && echo 'Reset all mock downstreams'
scripts.deploy: npm run generate:helm && helm upgrade --install kafka-workers ./helm/kafka-worker -f helm/kafka-worker/values-generated.json
